title: The Rebellion Regroups After Udon
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Kaido, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Hiyori as After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
scene: After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: URGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Forgive me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How am I to explain this to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I do not wish to disturb the slumber of the dead any more than you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... thirteen years from today a battle will be fought!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The day will come that the Samurai of this nation will raise their bowed heads in Union!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And on that day, they must be armed! They will need countless swords!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: On that battlefield, they will advance with the swords of their fallen comrades in hand!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The souls that live on in these blades will steel their hearts, and enable them to vanquish their enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A battle still rages here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Grrr Rrr!

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: The war between the hundred beast pirates

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Grrr Rrr!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And the people of Wano!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: These blades must not yet be put to rest!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet I cannot afford for them to be puffed by crooks before that Fated day comes!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will collect them all and hide them away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Grap RPRI

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Scrape

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have decided that this, at least, is a task to which I can bind myself...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As someone that failed to even protect Princess Hiyori...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this, at least, I can do... I must do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: GRRRRI

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I do not keep these hands busy, the guilt will consume me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If you are that starved for food,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just bite off this arm and be done with it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I refuse to stop defiling these graves! I have no other choice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Remember I

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Scrape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Scrape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Scrape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Scrape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Scrape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Scrape

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What strange windfall is this?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Has he under- stood what I meant?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let us dig down.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We will hide the blades underground.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WOOF!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Alright! Time to go loot some more graves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WOOF!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's so cold today I think I might freeze solid!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm starving... maybe if I sold one or two of these in the capital we could-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: GRPRRI

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Here, I brought some food I managed to "borrow."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WOOF!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Rebellion Regroups storyline with 46 dialogue beats. After Udon’s fall, the alliance regroups, hidden allies surface, and the Kozuki rebellion becomes more concrete.
